---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for LeShell
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the feature

What should LeShell do that it doesn't do today?

## Use case

Who runs into this need and when? Be specific — "I want X" is less useful than "When I try to do Y, I can't because Z."

## Proposed solution

What would you like to happen? Describe the behavior, not the implementation.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you try or consider? Why didn't those work for you?

## Additional context

Mockups, related issues, links to similar tools, or anything else that helps explain the request.
